initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    ca_zip,
    SUM(cs_sales_price) AS sum_cs_sales_price
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    (ca_zip LIKE '48%' OR ca_zip LIKE '49%' OR ca_zip LIKE '50%') 
    AND ca_state IN ('CA', 'WA', 'GA')
    OR cs_sales_price > 500
    AND d_qoy = 2
    AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    ca_zip
ORDER BY 
    ca_zip ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    ca_zip,
    SUM(cs_sales_price) AS sum_cs_sales_price
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    (ca_zip LIKE '852%' OR ca_zip LIKE '853%' OR ca_zip LIKE '850%')
    OR ca_state IN ('CA','WA','GA')
    OR cs_sales_price > 500
    AND d_qoy = 2
    AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    ca_zip
ORDER BY 
    ca_zip ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    ca_zip,
    SUM(cs_sales_price) AS sum_cs_sales_price
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    (ca_zip LIKE '857%' OR ca_zip LIKE '856%' OR ca_zip LIKE '855%' OR ca_zip LIKE '854%' OR ca_zip LIKE '853%' OR ca_zip LIKE '852%' OR ca_zip LIKE '851%' OR ca_zip LIKE '850%' OR ca_zip LIKE '849%' OR ca_zip LIKE '848%' OR ca_zip LIKE '847%' OR ca_zip LIKE '846%' OR ca_zip LIKE '845%' OR ca_zip LIKE '844%' OR ca_zip LIKE '843%' OR ca_zip LIKE '842%' OR ca_zip LIKE '841%' OR ca_zip LIKE '840%')
    OR ca_state IN ('CA','WA','GA')
    OR cs_sales_price > 500
    AND d_qoy = 2
    AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    ca_zip
ORDER BY 
    ca_zip ASC
LIMIT 100;
